creator: lenthe@comcast.net
text:
Port octave installs without libgfortran.so.2.  Shouldn't there be a dependency in the Makefile?

$ ldd /usr/local/libexec/octave/3.0.0/exec/amd64-portbld-freebsd7.0/octave-3.0.0
/usr/local/libexec/octave/3.0.0/exec/amd64-portbld-freebsd7.0/octave-3.0.0:
	liboctinterp.so => /usr/local/lib/octave-3.0.0/liboctinterp.so (0x800632000)
	liboctave.so => /usr/local/lib/octave-3.0.0/liboctave.so (0x8011c0000)
	libcruft.so => /usr/local/lib/octave-3.0.0/libcruft.so (0x801b72000)
	libumfpack.so.1 => /usr/local/lib/libumfpack.so.1 (0x801cd1000)
	libamd.so.1 => /usr/local/lib/libamd.so.1 (0x801e77000)
	libcamd.so.1 => /usr/local/lib/libcamd.so.1 (0x801f7f000)
	libcolamd.so.1 => /usr/local/lib/libcolamd.so.1 (0x802088000)
	libcholmod.so.1 => /usr/local/lib/libcholmod.so.1 (0x80218e000)
	libccolamd.so.1 => /usr/local/lib/libccolamd.so.1 (0x80235e000)
	libcxsparse.so.1 => /usr/local/lib/libcxsparse.so.1 (0x802467000)
	liblapack.so.4 => /usr/local/lib/liblapack.so.4 (0x802590000)
	libblas.so.2 => /usr/local/lib/libblas.so.2 (0x802bd7000)
	libfftw3.so.4 => /usr/local/lib/libfftw3.so.4 (0x802d2b000)
	libreadline.so.7 => /lib/libreadline.so.7 (0x802ed8000)
	libncurses.so.7 => /lib/libncurses.so.7 (0x803015000)
	libhdf5.so.0 => /usr/local/lib/libhdf5.so.0 (0x803171000)
	libz.so.4 => /lib/libz.so.4 (0x803397000)
	libgfortran.so.2 => not found (0x0)
	libm.so.5 => /lib/libm.so.5 (0x8034ab000)
	libthr.so.3 => /lib/libthr.so.3 (0x8035c5000)
	libstdc++.so.6 => /usr/lib/libstdc++.so.6 (0x8036db000)

	libssl.so.5 => /usr/lib/libssl.so.5 (0x803c11000)
	libcrypto.so.5 => /lib/libcrypto.so.5 (0x803d5b000)
